.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper version constant to a newer patch release.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 11 to support the new runtime environment.
Set Kotlin compiler JVM target to 11 to ensure bytecode compatibility with the new JDK version.
Switch from direct Quarkus BOM import to the Quarkus Universe Platform BOM for better dependency management in Quarkus 2.0.
Upgrade the Quarkus framework version to 2.0.2.Final to access new features and Java 11 support.
Add quarkus-kotlin dependency to enable Kotlin language support in the Quarkus application.
Add quarkus-rest-client dependency to support REST client functionality.
Add quarkus-jgit dependency to include Git operations support.
Add quarkus-resteasy-jackson dependency to use Jackson for JSON processing instead of JSON-B.
Add quarkus-hibernate-validator dependency for bean validation support.
Add quarkus-smallrye-health dependency for health check endpoints.
Add quarkus-logging-sentry dependency for Sentry error tracking integration.
Add quarkus-smallrye-openapi dependency for OpenAPI documentation generation.
Add quarkus-smallrye-metrics dependency for metrics collection.
Add quarkus-undertow dependency to explicitly include the Undertow web server.
Add commons-compress dependency for file compression utilities.
Add google-analytics-java dependency for Google Analytics integration.
Add quarkus-devtools-testing dependency for testing utilities.
Add hoverfly-java-junit5 dependency for HTTP simulation in tests.
Add quarkus-junit5 dependency for JUnit 5 testing support.
Add assertj-core dependency for fluent assertions in tests.
Remove quarkus-resteasy-jsonb dependency as it is replaced by Jackson.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to version 3.0.0-M5 for better test execution support.
Upgrade frontend-maven-plugin node version to v12.12.0 to align with modern frontend tooling.
Upgrade frontend-maven-plugin yarn version to v1.19.1.
Upgrade Kotlin compiler and plugin versions to 1.4.32.
Add resource filtering for application.properties to allow property substitution during build.
Add generate-code and generate-code-tests goals to quarkus-maven-plugin execution.
Add additional all-open annotations for Quarkus-specific classes in Kotlin compiler configuration.
Add native build arguments for resource and reflection configuration in GraalVM native image generation.
Add quarkus-main profile to allow building against Quarkus main branch snapshots.
Add backend-only profile to skip frontend build steps.
Add frozen-lockfile argument to yarn install for reproducible frontend builds.
Add yarn test execution to the build lifecycle.
Add maven.home system property to surefire and failsafe plugins.
Update project groupId and artifactId to reflect the new code.quarkus.io identity.

.dockerignore.general_idea: Include source code directory in the Docker build context to support Quarkus native or dev-mode builds.
Include the Maven POM file in the Docker build context to allow dependency resolution or build steps inside the container.
Include the Quarkus application directory structure required for the runner image in Quarkus 2.0.
Include custom Maven settings file in the Docker build context to support private repository access or specific build configurations.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add Eclipse factory path file to gitignore to prevent IDE metadata from being tracked.
Ignore the local Maven node wrapper directory to avoid committing downloaded binaries.
Ensure the gitignore file ends with a newline character for POSIX compliance.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven distribution version used by the wrapper to 3.8.1.
Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR version to 0.7.7.

mvnw.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper script to use version 0.5.6 instead of 0.5.5.
Correct the header comment to remove the obsolete '2' from 'Maven2'.
Clean up trailing whitespace in the curl download block.

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR version from 0.5.5 to 0.5.6 to align with newer tooling standards.
Correct a minor typo in the batch script comments from 'key stroke' to 'keystroke'.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: @REM MAVEN_BATCH_PAUSE - set to 'on' to wait for a keystroke before ending

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Update the script header comment to remove the outdated 'Maven2' designation.

src/main/frontend/.env.general_idea: Remove the SKIP_PREFLIGHT_CHECK environment variable to enforce standard React preflight checks during the frontend build process.

src/main/frontend/.gitignore.general_idea: Remove the /node directory from gitignore as it is no longer used or relevant in the new project structure.
Add .history/ directory to gitignore to exclude version control history files.
Add IntelliJ IDEA specific files and directories to gitignore to keep the repository clean of IDE artifacts.

src/main/frontend/README.md.general_idea: Remove the default Create React App documentation and boilerplate text from the frontend README.
src/main/frontend/README.md.human_impl: Deleted sections 'Available Scripts', 'Learn More', and the introductory CRA sentence.

src/main/frontend/README.md.general_idea: Add a specific project title and CI badge to the frontend README to identify the application.
src/main/frontend/README.md.human_impl: Added 'The Code Quarkus App Frontend' title and a CircleCI status badge.

src/main/frontend/README.md.general_idea: Replace detailed script explanations with concise, command-only instructions for prepare, start, and test.
src/main/frontend/README.md.human_impl: Replaced verbose npm script descriptions with simple 'yarn install', 'yarn start', and 'yarn test' code blocks.
